channel.title: Frontion News - Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Real-time geopolitical news monitoring and analysis

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU expands Iran sanctions to include Hormuz blockade officials
item.description: EU countries agreed to widen sanctions against Iran to target those responsible for blocking the Strait of Hormuz, according to EU foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas. The move escalates European pressure on Tehran amid the ongoing conflict.
item.dc:creator: Al Arabiya

item.title: 🇺🇸🇰🇷 US confirms no missile defense system moved from South Korea amid Iran war
item.description: A US general denied reports that a key missile defense system was relocated from South Korea to the Middle East for the Iran conflict, amid regional concerns about security gaps in the Indo-Pacific.
item.dc:creator: Al Arabiya

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Russia intensifies coastal mining in Crimea to prevent Ukrainian landings
item.description: Russian forces are mining beaches in occupied Crimea to prevent Ukrainian amphibious operations, according to Ukraine Southern Defense Forces spokesperson. "The beaches will now become minefields," said Vladyslav Voloshyn.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Hezbollah violates ceasefire with rocket attacks on Israeli troops in Lebanon
item.description: The IDF accused Hezbollah of breaching the ceasefire by launching rockets at Israeli troops in southern Lebanon and sending a drone toward Israel, raising concerns about escalation despite the truce.
item.dc:creator: Times of Israel

item.title: 🛢️🚢 Maersk warns ships to avoid Strait of Hormuz despite ceasefire
item.description: Danish shipping giant Maersk advised vessels to continue avoiding the Strait of Hormuz despite a temporary ceasefire between the US and Iran, citing ongoing volatility and lack of clarity on safe passage.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US positive on Iran deal talks but uncertain as ceasefire end nears
item.description: US officials expressed cautious optimism about ongoing Iran nuclear deal negotiations but acknowledged significant uncertainty remains as the current ceasefire deadline approaches.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump says new Iran deal will be "better than the old one"
item.description: President Trump claimed a new agreement with Iran would surpass the previous nuclear deal, though specific terms remain undisclosed.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: ⚔️ Pentagon pushes major budget increase for drones and air defenses used in Iran war
item.description: U.S. military officials are calling for spending tens of billions of dollars in the next budget year on drones, air defenses and other weapons that proved critical during the conflict with Iran.
item.dc:creator: AP

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinese student charged with photographing US military planes
item.description: A Chinese student faces federal charges for allegedly taking photos of U.S. military aircraft at a naval air station, heightening concerns about espionage activities.
item.dc:creator: AP

item.title: 🇳🇬 Nigeria charges six over alleged coup plot to overthrow Tinubu
item.description: Nigerian authorities charged six individuals with plotting to overthrow President Bola Tinubu, marking a significant political crisis in Africa's most populous nation.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇷🇺🇨🇳 NATO criticises Russian and Chinese nuclear stances, urges US cooperation
item.description: NATO officials criticized Russia and China for their nuclear postures while calling for renewed arms control cooperation with the United States.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 With tariffs stalled, Trump's China policy drifts
item.description: President Trump's China trade policy appears directionless as tariff negotiations stall and Beijing resists key US demands.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇨🇦❄️ Canadian military aims to show it can go it alone in Arctic
item.description: Canada's military conducted exercises demonstrating independent Arctic defense capabilities amid growing concerns about Russian and Chinese activity in the polar region.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 💰 RTX lifts profit forecasts amid strong demand for weapons
item.description: Defense contractor RTX raised its profit and revenue forecasts as global conflicts drive unprecedented demand for military equipment.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇱🇧 Top US senators call to halt aid to Lebanese Army over failed Hezbollah disarmament
item.description: Senior US senators urged cutting military aid to Lebanon, citing the government's failure to disarm Hezbollah in southern Lebanon.
item.dc:creator: Al Arabiya

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan firm speeds up drone development amid China pressure
item.description: Taiwanese companies are accelerating drone production as the island nation prepares its military capabilities against growing Chinese threats.
item.dc:creator: Straits Times

item.title: 🇺🇦 Sanctions relief fueling Russia's war ambitions, Zelensky warns
item.description: President Zelensky warned that weakening sanctions regimes are emboldening Russia to continue its war, calling for stricter enforcement.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇧🇬 Bulgaria's election: Not a reversal but what Radev's landslide means for Ukraine
item.description: Bulgaria's pro-Russian president Radev won a decisive victory, raising questions about Sofia's continued support for Kyiv.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump invokes Defense Production Act for oil and coal infrastructure
item.description: President Trump used emergency powers to boost domestic energy production, citing national security needs amid the Iran conflict.
item.dc:creator: The Hill

item.title: ⚔️ Trump tells PBS: "Lots of bombs start going off" if Iran ceasefire expires
item.description: President Trump warned of severe military consequences if the Iran ceasefire expires without a deal.
item.dc:creator: PBS

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea launches multiple short-range ballistic missiles
item.description: North Korea test-fired multiple short-range ballistic missiles, continuing its weapons development despite international warnings.
item.dc:creator: ABC News

item.title: 🇮🇷 Live updates: US seizes Iranian ship, Trump blockade at Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Comprehensive coverage of the US-Iran conflict including ship seizures, blockades, and diplomatic developments.
item.dc:creator: NBC News

item.title: 🤖 Humanoid robots complete half-marathon in Beijing
item.description: Humanoid robots participated in a half-marathon in Beijing, showcasing China's advancing robotics capabilities.
item.dc:creator: AP

item.title: 🇺🇳 Race to lead embattled UN heats up as four hopefuls enter hearings
item.description: Four candidates vying to become the next UN Secretary-General presented their visions amid global crises.
item.dc:creator: Malay Mail

item.title: 🇺🇸 Lori Chavez-DeRemer resigns from Trump Cabinet
item.description: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer resigned from the Trump administration, marking another Cabinet departure.
item.dc:creator: AP
